description.value:
Adeptus Ministorum

The Adeptus Ministorum, also known as the Ecclesiarchy, is the official state church of the Imperium, devoted to the worship of the God-Emperor. Its clergy range from humble parish priests to powerful cardinals, from fiery confessors to warrior-priests of the Frateris Militia. Those who serve the Ministorum are steeped in faith, rhetoric, and the ability to inspire or terrorise the masses in equal measure.

Background Aptitudes

Leadership, Social

Starting Skills

Charm, Common Lore (Ecclesiarchy), Linguistics (High Gothic)

Starting Talent

Weapon Training (Flame) or Weapon Training (Las)

Background Bonus

Faith Is All: A Ministorum character counts as having the Peer (Ecclesiarchy) Talent. When spending a Fate Point, they may also inspire one ally within earshot to gain a +10 bonus to their next Test.

specialAbilities.name: Faith Is All
specialAbilities.description: A Ministorum character counts as having the Peer (Ecclesiarchy) Talent. When spending a Fate Point, they may also inspire one ally within earshot to gain a +10 bonus to their next Test.
